intro.text: I am Ysha, Bloom of the Elite Four. The flowers and the fae walk with me. Beauty is not weakness, challenger. Let me show you the thorns beneath the petals.

win.text: You danced through my garden without trampling a single petal. Beautifully done. Move forward.

lose.text: The garden has claimed another. Do not feel shame - even the mightiest trees bow before the storm.
